method_descriptions.full_system: Current production-style path: visual retrieval when available, owner corrections, reference guard, variant/design resolver, and answer policy.
method_descriptions.metadata_baseline: Deterministic metadata fallback: text/category/color cues plus the same decision policy.
method_descriptions.no_identity_ablation: Same retrieval candidates as the full path, but variant_group_id/design_id removed before the decision layer.
method_descriptions.policy_oracle: Decision-policy ceiling test: injects the known image product as a high-score raw visual hit.
method_descriptions.naive_oracle_top1: Unsafe baseline: high-score top-1 is called exact without reference-image or business-rule gating.
